# Pegasus Delegation And Ownership Contract

## Scope And Authority

This manually loaded reference owns specialist execution and ownership boundaries. It is subordinate to the current macro and phase reference. It does not grant phase authorization.

The invoking orchestrator coordinates; the assigned specialist executes its phase directly. The specialist owns its phase edits, validations, preliminary checks, persistence attempts, and result evidence unless a higher contract explicitly assigns another owner.

Do not delegate, launch another agent, recursively invoke the same phase, absorb another phase, or claim another actor's work. Return control at the phase boundary. If required ownership or execution capability is unavailable, return blocked rather than transferring ownership implicitly.
